use_cases: Revealing text content with a smooth blur-to-clear effect as users scroll down a page
Animating card components into view with staggered delays for visual hierarchy
Adding scroll-triggered entrance animations to hero sections and landing pages
Creating subtle, professional animations on images and media content
Enhancing form sections with graceful fade-in animations on scroll
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-based utility component that creates a smooth blur-to-fade entrance animation when elements scroll into the viewport. Uses CSS blur filters and opacity transitions triggered by Intersection Observer. Configurable duration, delay, y-offset, and blur intensity make it suitable for adding polished scroll animations to any content.
